name: aeko-plugin
description: AEKO skills for Codex — AEO workflows (PDP optimization, content briefs, JSON-LD, brand kit, action center). Pair with the AEKO MCP connector for backend tool access.

interface.shortDescription: AEO skills for ecommerce — PDP, content, schema, brand kit
interface.longDescription: AEKO skills guide Codex through AEO (AI Engine Optimization) workflows for cross-border ecommerce: optimize product pages for ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/Perplexity citations, draft persona-targeted content from live suggestions, generate JSON-LD structured data, manage your brand kit, and execute action items. Requires the AEKO MCP connector for backend access.
defaultPrompt: Run an AEO audit on this product page.
Generate Product JSON-LD for this PDP.
Show me my AEKO action items.
